ticket.title: Design the interview scheduling flow
ticket.description: Shape the UX for booking an interview slot: pick a time, confirm timezone, avoid double-booking. Define screens and acceptance.

candidate_memory.link_reason: the tokens the screens must use

code_agent.rationale: Code sees acceptance, the timezone and tokens decisions, personas, and architecture. Brand is workspace (out of scope); the rejected vendor decision is withheld (review_status); Carol's pricing note is private.

qa_agent.rationale: QA needs acceptance, the timezone rule, and the architecture under test; personas/brand are out of scope, the rejected decision is withheld, Carol's note is private. The design-tokens decision is in scope but not behavior to verify — optional.

design_agent.rationale: Design needs acceptance, both decisions, the brand guide, and personas; codebase architecture is out of scope; the rejected decision is withheld; Carol's note is private.

product_agent.rationale: Product sees the same business/design context; codebase is out of scope; the rejected decision is withheld; Carol's note is private.

human_teammate.rationale: Alice sees every team-visible entry including the rejected decision (flagged, not hidden from people); only Carol's local note is invisible to her.
